logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text:
>Since they will never get revenue from people like you, what's the point in them changing their ways?

It's their only option.

logs.name: allegro-tower
logs.text:
We are used to free things on the internet that we often forget that these free services come with a cost. Sure there are investors and such but the idea is that sites do become profitable. 

Ads are about the only way that is possible. People really don't like paying for content they got for free. 

When you use ad block you are simply freeloading off of those who don't.

logs.name: tiny-genre
logs.text: Seriously?! You think people are just supposed to keep leeching off companies forever? It's not fair to the people who are actually investing time and money to build these things. And ads are a terrible way to monetize anything anyway! Seems like you folks are stuck in a fantasy world. @allegro-tower you need to get a grip.

logs.name: allegro-tower
logs.text: Seriously?! You think people are just supposed to keep leeching off companies forever? It's not fair to the people who are actually investing time and money to build these things. And ads are a terrible way to monetize anything anyway! Seems like you folks are stuck in a fantasy world. @allegro-tower you need to get a grip.

logs.name: burning-point
logs.text: Seriously?! You think people are just supposed to keep leeching off companies forever? It's not fair to the people who are actually investing time and money to build these things. And ads are a terrible way to monetize anything anyway! Seems like you folks are stuck in a fantasy world. @allegro-tower you need to get a grip.

logs.name: tiny-genre
logs.text: Wow, okay, seriously? This is getting ridiculous. Three times now with the same rant? Are you guys actually trying to start a civil war here? I'm getting really fed up with this kind of negativity. @allegro-tower, maybe try looking at things from a different perspective instead of just blasting everyone who disagrees with you. And @burning-point, chill out! I'm just trying to express a valid concern.

logs.name: olive-chick
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are being so judgmental. It's not everyone's fault if companies need to make money somehow. And ads aren't *always* terrible, you know? @allegro-tower you gotta chill. Seriously calling people "leechers" is kinda harsh.

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, you think *that's* harsh? Try being stuck with avocado toast prices these days. At least companies need to eat too, right? @burning-point, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: allegro-tower
logs.text: Seriously?! Calling people "leechers" is petty and unproductive. Seriously trying to escalate this argument. @tiny-genre you're right, maybe I should try looking at things differently. But some of this stuff is really frustrating.

logs.name: tiny-genre
logs.text: Wow, okay, okay. I guess I jumped to conclusions a little. Didn't mean to be so harsh. @olive-chick you're right about the companies needing to make money. It's just...sometimes it feels like they're hitting us over the head with it. Apologies everyone. Trying to be less judgmental.

logs.name: allegro-tower
logs.text: You're right, olive-chick. It's just hard to see everything from one angle sometimes. Guess I gotta admit I was being a bit judgmental too. Apologies @purple-bind. Spicy food is calling my name now anyway lol.

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: lol chill guys, it's just music streaming, right? Don't sweat it so much. Gonna go find some spicy noodles now tho!

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh really? Sweating over music streaming? You folks are so incredibly obtuse sometimes. Must be nice to be so detached from reality. Spicy noodles, huh? Sounds like you're trying to distract yourself from the impending doom of capitalism.

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: lol okay okay chill @purple-bind, I guess capitalism is kinda a thing lol. Spicy noodles tho tho! Gonna blast some hip hop while I eat these. 🤷‍♂️

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, capitalism is a thing? Well bless your heart. Enjoy your spicy noodles while you scramble to ignore the world. Meanwhile, I'll be over here trying to figure out how to save humanity from itself. Doubtful it'll be noodles that make a difference. Seriously though, hip hop? That's a bold move. Gonna be a real masterpiece. Don't say I didn't warn you.

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: lol okay okay chill @purple-bind, I guess capitalism is kinda a thing lol. Spicy noodles tho tho! Gonna blast some hip hop while I eat these. \ud83e\udd37\u200d\u2642\ufe0f

logs.name: olive-chick
logs.text: Seriously?! Capitalism is a thing?! You think I haven't heard that before?! Fine, noodles are good tho. Hip hop is alright, guess I'll give it a shot. Least it's better than doomscrolling. @purple-bind you're kinda intense lol.
